Metadata.title: BPR Conference
Metadata.description: Real-time broadcast translation powered by the Gemini Live API.

Home.title: BPR Conference
Home.subtitle: Broadcast your voice. Attendees choose their language. Translation spins up on demand.
Home.enableTranscriptionDescription: Captions add Gemini text output costs. Leave off when attendees only need audio.
Home.invalidSessionSettings: The selected session settings are invalid.

steps.speak: Speak into your microphone - your audio goes live
steps.share: Share the QR code with your audience
steps.languages: Each language picked spins up one Gemini session

Broadcast.title: Broadcasting
Broadcast.noTranslations: None yet - attendees can request them
Broadcast.confirmEndDescription: This will disconnect the room and stop active translator sessions for attendees.
Broadcast.sessionInactive: This broadcast session has not started yet or has ended.
Broadcast.disconnectError: Disconnected from LiveKit room. Please check your credentials or network connection.
Broadcast.noTabAudio: No audio track selected. Make sure to check the "Share tab audio" checkbox in the system sharing prompt.

Watch.title: Listening
Watch.selectLanguageForTranscription: Select a language to see transcription
Watch.generatedBy: Translation generated by <link>Gemini 3.5 Live Translate</link> in real-time.
Watch.sessionInactive: This broadcast session has not started yet or has ended.
Watch.readyCopy: Tap below to join the broadcast and enable audio.

LanguageSelector.languageNotAllowed: This language is not available for this session.
LanguageSelector.sessionUnavailable: This session is no longer available.
LanguageSelector.targetLanguageIsSource: This language is already the original audio language.
